function.name: bash_action
function.arguments:
{"script":"set -euo pipefail
shopt -s nullglob
cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" 2>/dev/null || true

# Prime check for server IDs 1..100
is_prime() {
  local n="$1"
  if (( n < 2 )); then return 1; fi
  local i
  for (( i=2; i*i<=n; i++ )); do
    if (( n % i == 0 )); then return 1; fi
  done
  return 0
}

sum=0
now_epoch=$(date +%s)

for f in log_files/log_server_*_*.txt; do
  [[ -e "$f" ]] || continue
  base=$(basename "$f")
  # Extract server id and date
  # Expected: log_server_X_YYYY-MM-DD.txt
  if [[ "$base" =~ ^log_server_([0-9]+)_([0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2})\.txt$ ]]; then
    sid="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    fdate="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
  else
    continue
  fi

  # Check server id is prime
  if ! is_prime "$sid"; then
    continue
  fi

  # Check created within last 7 days (use file mtime)
  # If mtime is within 7*86400 seconds
  mtime_epoch=$(stat -c %Y "$f")
  if (( now_epoch - mtime_epoch > 7*86400 )); then
    continue
  fi

  # Sum integers in file
  while IFS= read -r line; do
    [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
    # Accept integers only
    if [[ "$line" =~ ^-?[0-9]+$ ]]; then
      sum=$((sum + line))
    fi
  done < "$f"
done

echo "$sum""}
